title: Simple Death Coordinates
description: Never lose your items again. Logs your death coordinates and distance in chat, click to copy for quick navigation.
body:
# Never lose your items again.
This lightweight mod automatically logs your death coordinates and distance in chat upon respawn, featuring a click-to-copy function for quick and easy navigation.

![message in chat image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c639ba37f8351082f627924231b92c5a9eaf637_0.webp)

## ✨ Features
- **Vanilla Style Integration:** The notifications are designed to mimic the look and feel of native /locate or game system messages. Keeping your HUD clean and authentic.

- **Instant Coordinates:** Automatically displays your exact XYZ location the moment you respawn.

- **Distance Tracker:** Shows exactly how far you are from your death point so you can plan your recovery.

- **Click-to-Copy:** Simply click the chat message to copy your coordinates to the clipboard for easy use with waypoints or teleports.

- **Lightweight:** No extra menus, no clutter—just the information you need, exactly when you need it.

## 🧩 How to use
1. Die in the game while exploring or building.

1. Upon respawning, check your chat for the automatically generated death message, styled just like a standard system notification.

1. Click on the coordinates in the chat to copy them to your clipboard.

1. Paste the coordinates into your favorite waypoint mod, map tool, or use them to teleport back if you have the necessary permissions!

## ⚙️ Compatibility & Technical Details
- **Vanilla-Friendly:** The UI does not use custom inventory screens or complex pop-ups. It utilizes the standard Minecraft chat component system, ensuring full compatibility with other mods and custom chat interfaces.

- **Performance:** Optimized for minimal resource usage, ensuring zero impact on your FPS or game logic.
 
- **Version Support:** Works on any server (even if it's not installed on the server-side), making it the perfect tool for survival multiplayer and single-player worlds alike.
